sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43185" key="e(teropaxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερο-πᾰχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n43185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of unequal thickness</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:164:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">164.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
